description_long: This object is a long, straight-edged knife or sword with a sleek, modern design. The blade appears to be metallic with a matte gray finish, running the full length of the object and tapering to a fine edge. The handle is solid black, rectangular, and slightly raised above the blade, providing a comfortable grip. A thin, bronze or brass accent line separates the blade from the handle, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, with no visible serrations or complex geometry. The object is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible ornamentation beyond the accent strip.
description: A long, straight-edged knife or sword with a matte gray blade, black rectangular handle, and a bronze accent line. The design is sleek, modern, and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the blade, the black handle on top, and the bronze accent line clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the object's flatness.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the blade and handle, with the bronze accent line still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim edge and the handle's thickness.
attribute_handle_design: rectangular, black, solid, smooth, no visible texture or contouring
